# Nelson Freight — Email Intelligence Platform

> NVOCC freight forwarding Vietnam→USA/Canada. Email intelligence pipeline with Microsoft Graph API (no Outlook COM). FastAPI backend, local-only data.

## Architecture

- [SYSTEM_STANDARDS.md](docs/SYSTEM_STANDARDS.md): Single source of truth for system standards, canonical paths, and rules
- [Nelson Architecture](docs/DATA_FLOW.md): 3-tier architecture — CODE (Engine_test), DATA (OneDrive/NelsonData), LOCAL

## Email Pipeline

- [EMAIL PIPELINE SOURCE OF TRUTH](docs/EMAIL_PIPELINE_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md): Complete email flow — send, scan, bounce, reply, suppression
- [EMAIL DASHBOARD V7](docs/EMAIL_DASHBOARD_V7.md): Dashboard 9 tabs, local web server port 8100
- [EMAIL DASHBOARD V7 WORKFLOW](docs/EMAIL_DASHBOARD_V7_WORKFLOW.md): Daily rotation workflow, Smart Send 700/day
- [Email Dashboard Versioning](docs/email-dashboard-versioning.md): Version contract — filename fixed, version in code only

## Smart Send

- [SMART SEND CONTRACT](docs/contracts/SMART_SEND_CONTRACT.md): Smart Send flow contract — preview, confirm, batch send
- [Rate Pipeline Contract](docs/rate-pipeline-contract.md): Rate builder return keys and schema

## Daily Rotation

- [DAILY ROTATION ENGINE](docs/DAILY_ROTATION_ENGINE.md): Rotation engine 700/day, cooldown rules, campaign tracking
- [ARB Origin Mapping](docs/ARB_ORIGIN_MAPPING.md): ARB port codes and origin mapping

## Data

- [MASTER V7 SCHEMA](docs/MASTER_V7_SCHEMA.md): Master file schema (contact_unified_v7.xlsx)
- [Panjiva Export Guide](docs/PANJIVA_EXPORT_GUIDE.md): Panjiva data extraction pipeline

## ERP

- [ERP v14 Source of Truth](docs/erp-v14-source-of-truth.md): ERP v14 live on OneDrive, refresh scripts
- [ERP VBA Standards](docs/ERP_V14_VBA_STANDARDS.md): VBA coding standards for ERP v14
- [VBA Gotchas](docs/vba-gotchas.md): Known VBA pitfalls (Declarations before Subs, etc.)

## Development

- [Setup PC Home](docs/SETUP_PC_HOME.md): Development environment setup
- [ERP Automation Test Stack](docs/erp-automation-test-stack.md): Testing framework for ERP automation
- [Feature Checklist](docs/feature-checklist.md): Development checklist for new features
- [Known Legacy Failures](docs/known-legacy-failures.md): Known issues in legacy code

## API

- [Webapp Upgrade Roadmap](docs/webapp-upgrade-roadmap.md): Next.js dashboard roadmap

## Integrations

- [MiniMax Cheatsheet](docs/minimax-cheatsheet.md): MiniMax M2.7 sidecar commands and quota

## Contracts

- [Domain Email](docs/contracts/DOMAIN-EMAIL.md): Email domain rules
- [Domain Data](docs/contracts/DOMAIN-DATA.md): Data domain rules
- [Domain ERP](docs/contracts/DOMAIN-ERP.md): ERP domain rules
- [Domain Code](docs/contracts/DOMAIN-CODE.md): Code domain rules

## Optional

- [Charge Name Source of Truth](docs/CHARGE_NAME_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md): Charge name mappings
- [Market Report 4C System](docs/market-report-4c-system.md): Market analysis framework
- [S1V2 Target Watch Schema](docs/s1v2-target-watch-schema.md): S1V2 rate watch schema
